claim: Behavior rule: In similar future work, apply this decision: Implemented a post-install Codex hook approval flow. The installer now creates DinoBrain Codex Hook Approval.cmd and launches it after hook registration unless skipped. The helper detects stale Codex desktop processes, restarts/reopens Codex, copies /hooks to the clipboard, and shows instructions while preserving the requirement that the user manually trusts the hook. Updated the Windows setup UI with a checked-by-default approval flow option, added verification, updated uninstall cleanup, bumped version to 0.1.4, pushed main/tag, uploaded the v0.1.4 release ZIP, and verified the uploaded private asset hash.
